scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build && npx firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:web: npm run build && npx firebase deploy --only hosting,database
scripts.build:mobile: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:release: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:release:win: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && .\gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.ios:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:release: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
